---
title: "D. Policy Libraries"
subtitle: "Conditional Access, Intune, Azure Arc, STIG, SCuBA baselines, Defender"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: D
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# D. Policy Libraries {.unnumbered}

The encoded controls. Policies are the runtime artifacts that enforce the
mandates from §A. UIAO treats policies as canon: named, versioned,
OrgPath-targeted, and delivered via the transformation engine — not
hand-edited in admin portals.

## Leaves

- **D.1** Conditional Access Policy Library
- **D.2** Intune Policy Templates
- **D.3** Azure Arc / Guest Configuration
- **D.4** STIG compliance — [adapter](../../adapter-specs/stig-compliance/stig-compliance.qmd)
- **D.5** SCuBA baseline policies
- **D.6** Defender for Servers policies
